inputs.label: Field Area
inputs.businessContext: Total land area used for the crop.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total land area used for the crop.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahsul için kullanılan toplam arazi alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte für die Kultur genutzte Landfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Superficie totale de terrain utilisée pour la culture.
businessContext_i18n.es: Superficie total de terreno utilizada para el cultivo.

inputs.label: Crop Yield per Hectare
inputs.businessContext: Expected yield of the crop per hectare.

label_i18n.fr: Rendement de la culture par hectare

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected yield of the crop per hectare.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement attendu de la culture par hectare.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento esperado del cultivo por hectárea.

inputs.label: Field Loss Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of harvest lost on the field due to factors like weather or pests.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of harvest lost on the field due to factors like weather or pests.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hava veya zararlılar gibi faktörler nedeniyle tarlada kaybedilen hasatın tahmini yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Prozentsatz der Ernte, der auf dem Feld durch Faktoren wie Wetter oder Schädlinge verloren geht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage estimé de la récolte perdue au champ en raison de facteurs comme la météo ou les nuisibles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje estimado de la cosecha perdida en el campo debido a factores como clima o plagas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية المقدرة للحصاد المفقود في الحقل بسبب عوامل مثل الطقس أو الآفات.

inputs.label: Storage Loss Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of remaining harvest lost during storage and handling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of remaining harvest lost during storage and handling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Depolama ve elleçleme sırasında kaybedilen kalan hasatın tahmini yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Prozentsatz der verbleibenden Ernte, der während der Lagerung und Handhabung verloren geht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage estimé de la récolte restante perdue lors du stockage et de la manutention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje estimado de la cosecha restante perdida durante el almacenamiento y manejo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية المقدرة للحصاد المتبقي المفقود أثناء التخزين والمناولة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
